title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
